title: uwu >~<
body:
# Your help required 1.19.3 has changed their chat signing system to the point where it basically breaks almost every aspect of the mod
And hence I request your help to help me find all the current bugs with 1.19.3 and create issues regarding it on the [issues page](https://github.com/Ran-Mewo/UwU/issues)
Some people have reported to have issues running this mod on Quilt but unfortunately I haven't managed to reproduce any of the Quilt issues so if you could then please make create a issue regarding it on the [issues page](https://github.com/Ran-Mewo/UwU/issues)
thi-is is a minyecwaft mod that uwuifies things fow you wanging fwom text messages to the entiwe minyecwaft cwient i-if you diswike any pawt of the mod then it can be disabwed in the config >~<
![config](https://i.imgur.com/U3NDh60.png)
